---
title: "2025 Peach Tree Lottery Sales Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    orientation: columns
    css: dashboard-theme.css
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
library(plotly)
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
georgia_lottery <- readRDS("georgia_lottery.RDS")
source("create_lottery_map.R")
```

```{r}
#| label: prep-data
data_2025 <- georgia_lottery |>
  filter(year == 2025)
```

## Column {width=50%}

### Row

```{r}
#| title: "Per Capita Lottery Sales"
create_lottery_map(data_2025, per_capita = TRUE)
```

## Column {width=50%}

### Row {height=50%}

```{r}
#| title: "Lottery Spend by Sex"
sex_totals <- data_2025 |>
  group_by(sex) |>
  summarise(spend = sum(lottery_spend, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

plot_ly(
  sex_totals,
  labels = ~sex,
  values = ~spend,
  type = "pie",
  hole = 0.5,
  marker = list(colors = c("#4393c3", "#d6604d"),
                line = list(color = "white", width = 2)),
  textinfo = "label+percent",
  textfont = list(size = 14, color = "white")
) |>
  layout(showlegend = FALSE,
         margin = list(t = 0, b = 0, l = 0, r = 0))
```

```{r}
#| title: "Lottery Spend by Race/Ethnicity"
race_totals <- data_2025 |>
  group_by(race_ethnicity) |>
  summarise(spend = sum(lottery_spend, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

race_colors <- c(
  "#4393c3", "#d6604d", "#74c476", "#9e9ac8",
  "#fdae6b", "#41ab5d", "#f4a582"
)

plot_ly(
  race_totals,
  labels = ~race_ethnicity,
  values = ~spend,
  type = "pie",
  hole = 0.5,
  marker = list(colors = race_colors,
                line = list(color = "white", width = 2)),
  textinfo = "label+percent",
  textfont = list(size = 12, color = "white")
) |>
  layout(showlegend = FALSE,
         margin = list(t = 0, b = 0, l = 0, r = 0))
```

### Row {height=50%}

```{r}
#| title: "Lottery Spend by Age Group"
age_totals <- data_2025 |>
  group_by(age_group) |>
  summarise(spend = sum(lottery_spend, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(age_totals, aes(x = age_group, y = spend / 1e6, fill = age_group)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("$", round(spend / 1e6, 1), "M")),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Blues", direction = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format(suffix = "M"), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(
    x = "Age group",
    y = "Spend (millions)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())
```

```{r}
#| title: "Lottery Spend by Income Level"
income_totals <- data_2025 |>
  group_by(income_level) |>
  summarise(spend = sum(lottery_spend, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(income_totals, aes(x = income_level, y = spend / 1e6, fill = income_level)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0("$", round(spend / 1e6, 1), "M")),
    vjust = -0.4, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Oranges", direction = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format(suffix = "M"), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(
    x = "Income level",
    y = "Spend (millions)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  )
```
